name: magizh-trader-tracker
description: Magizh Trader - Weekly & Monthly MNQ Futures Profit Tracker

scripts.build: npm run build:clean && npm run build:data
scripts.backup: node -e "const fs=require('fs');const d=new Date().toISOString().slice(0,10);const src='data/tracker.db';if(fs.existsSync(src)){fs.mkdirSync('backups',{recursive:true});fs.copyFileSync(src,'backups/tracker_'+d+'.db');console.log('Backup saved: backups/tracker_'+d+'.db');}else{console.log('No database to backup.');}"
scripts.restore: node -e "const fs=require('fs');const files=fs.existsSync('backups')?fs.readdirSync('backups').filter(f=>f.endsWith('.db')).sort():[];if(!files.length){console.log('No backups found in backups/');}else{const latest='backups/'+files[files.length-1];fs.mkdirSync('data',{recursive:true});fs.copyFileSync(latest,'data/tracker.db');console.log('Restored from',latest);}"
scripts.info: node -e "const fs=require('fs');const pkg=require('./package.json');const db='data/tracker.db';const exists=fs.existsSync(db);const size=exists?fs.statSync(db).size:0;console.log('\n  App     :',pkg.name,'v'+pkg.version);console.log('  Node    :',process.version);console.log('  DB      :',exists?db+' ('+size+' bytes)':'not created yet');console.log('  Port    :',process.env.PORT||3000);console.log();"
